raw_consumer_statement: I disputed a charge XXXX of {$62.00} description XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX from XXXX XXXX which I did not place, and that I do not recognize on my Citibank credit card Double Cash account ending in # XXXX. Citibank notified me that the charge was reversed and removed from my statement. Subsequently to that Citibank reversed the charge notating that XXXX XXXX had provided some proof of the purchase. The proof of purchase provided by XXXX XXXX lists a different card holder under the name of XXXX XXXX with address at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX, NJ. The proof of purchase also notated that XXXX XXXX had in the past made various purchases with XXXX XXXX. The purchase under dispute is for 2x cholocalte shakes, 2x vanilla shakes, and 6x Ranch Snacks. Again I have not purchased or received any of those items and I am completely unfamiliar with the above address in XXXX XXXX or a person named XXXX XXXX. Citibank should not have reversed the fraudulent charge under my card when it is clear that XXXX XXXX submitted confirmation for another completely different person.
